states.whyNow: Indiana is a broad Midwest gap where local health department routing can create a real permit-path wedge without needing fake technical precision.
states.launchAngle: Target angle: local permit path, county file quality, and next-call clarity before install quotes harden.
researchTasks: Find the statewide homeowner-facing onsite sewage or residential septic guidance hub.
Collect county or local health department routing that determines the real permit office.
Pull a homeowner-safe permit sequence that can anchor a permit page without overclaiming.
